{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Ozriel’s Soulsmith inheritance
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ozriel]]'s [[Soulsmith inheritance]] is a potential prize.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20">''Reaper'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ozriel’s Soulsmith inheritance]] is something [[Lindon]] wishes he had taken.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
